source_jobs.title: Growth Marketing Lead
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT GOODIE AI



Goodie helps leading brands win AI search. As billions of people use ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and other AI systems to discover products and make buying decisions, brands need a way to understand and influence how they're represented.

Goodie gives teams a full AI control plane: real-time visibility into how AI models speak about their brand and products, how competitors show up, and an optimization engine to improve visibility and performance. This category didn't exist two years ago. We were early, and we're defining it.

We're backed by strong investors, trusted by category-leading customers, and scaling fast. We're hiring curious, ambitious builders to help shape the future of AI search.



What we're looking for:

A hybrid operator who is equal parts marketer, strategist, and builder. You will own the full growth engine end-to-end and report directly to the CEO.

You’re comfortable setting up tracking, building automations, and running experiments with statistical rigor. You’re also senior enough to own the strategic roadmap and present growth performance directly to the CEO. This is a role for someone who leads from the front and operates across every layer, from high-level strategy to hands-on execution.

You will work side-by-side with our growth marketing agency partner, who handles paid, content, and creative execution at scale. Your job is to set the strategy, coordinate the agency team, hold them accountable to results, and get into the work with them. You own the brief and the results. You own the strategy and the execution.





What you'll do:

Brand and Product Marketing

 - Define and own Goodie's brand narrative, positioning, and messaging across all audiences and channels

 - Own positioning and messaging for product launches and feature releases

 - Maintain competitive intelligence across the AEO, GEO, and broader AI search landscape

 - Own top-of-funnel and bottom-of-funnel metrics and report directly to the CEO

Growth, Performance, and AEO

 - Own Goodie's AEO and SEO performance directly: we sell the platform, so we have to win at it ourselves

 - Plan and run paid campaigns with direct, hands-on involvement: write the briefs, analyze performance, iterate creative and messaging

 - Run a high-velocity experimentation program with clear hypotheses, real statistical rigor, and documented learnings

Analytics and Attribution

 - Build the measurement stack yourself: GA4, attribution modeling, leadership dashboards

 - Connect every marketing dollar to revenue with clear, defensible attribution

 - Live in the data: build your own models, identify the metrics that matter, and ruthlessly cut the ones that don't

Automation and AI Leverage

 - Build automations, workflows, and internal tools that multiply marketing throughput

 - Use AI tools across the funnel: research, content, outreach, ops, reporting, and competitive intelligence

 - Treat the marketing function like a software product: ship, measure, iterate

Agency Management

 - Run the day-to-day relationship with the agency partner: set priorities, assign work, and hold the team accountable to KPIs

 - Coordinate across agency functions (paid media, AEO/SEO, content, creative) to ensure integrated campaign execution

 - Treat the agency as an extension of your team and execute alongside them, not above them





What you bring:

 - 5+ years in growth, performance marketing, or hybrid marketing roles, ideally at an early-stage B2B SaaS company; clear track record of owning a growth number and hitting it

 - Hands-on technical comfort: you can set up tracking and attribution infrastructure, build and iterate on landing pages without waiting on engineering, and build your own data models without needing someone to create a dashboard for you

 - Deep SEO background with hands-on AEO or GEO experience, or a strong intuition for how AI models surface and cite brand content; experience running a structured experimentation program wit

source_jobs.title: Frontend Software Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT GOODIE AI:



Goodie helps leading brands win AI search. As billions of people use ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and other AI systems to discover products and make buying decisions, brands need a way to understand and influence how they’re represented.

Goodie gives teams a full AI control plane: real-time visibility into how AI models speak about their brand and products, how competitors show up, and an optimization engine to improve visibility and performance. This category didn’t exist two years ago - we were early, and we’re defining it.

We’re backed by strong investors, trusted by category-leading customers, and scaling fast. We’re hiring curious, ambitious builders to help shape the future of AI search.



What we are looking for:

We're seeking an exceptional Senior Software Engineer to join our rapidly growing AI Lab. You will play a critical role in driving and accelerating the development of cutting-edge AI use cases, working closely with our Product Lead, Designers and Machine Learning Engineers to design and build scalable, industry-leading AI solutions.





What you'll do:

 - Lead the development of our AI platform, focusing on scalability, speed, and user experience.

 - Architect and develop front-end solutions using React to create smooth, engaging, and intentional user experiences.

 - Implement back-end infrastructure with a focus on speed, scalability, security, and seamless integration with various platforms via robust API connections.

 - Utilize DevOps practices to manage the deployment pipeline, ensuring efficient, reliable, and secure software delivery.

 - Collaborate with UX/UI Designers to translate web designs into functional, intuitive user interfaces.

 - Work closely with Data Scientists to ensure accurate data collection, analysis, and application within the platform.

 - Participate in the entire application lifecycle, from coding to debugging and testing, with an emphasis on quality and performance.

 - Maintain and optimize the performance of existing applications.

 - Stay up-to-date with emerging technologies and explore potential integrations to enhance our operations.





What you have:

 - 5+ years of full-stack development experience with a proven track record of building high usage B2B software applications.

 - Proficiency in React for front-end development, with a strong understanding of how to build responsive, high-performance web applications.

 - Experience with server-side languages such as Python, Node.js, or Java.

 - Strong understanding of DevOps practices and experience in software deployment, including CI/CD pipelines, containerization (e.g., Docker), and cloud infrastructure (AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure).

 - Solid knowledge of database management systems (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB).

 - Experience with RESTful APIs, API integration, and data exchange formats (JSON, XML).

 - Familiarity with software development best practices, including version control (Git), testing, and continuous integration/deployment (CI/CD).

 - Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to debug complex systems.

 - Strong leadership and communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.

 - Passion for ad tech and a desire to work in a fast-paced, innovative startup environment.

 - BSc in Computer Science, Engineering, or a relevant field.




BEWARE OF FRAUD! Please be aware of potentially fraudulent job postings or suspicious activity by persons that are posing as Goodie AI team members, recruiters, and HR employees. Our team will contact you regarding job opportunities from email addresses ending in @nogood.io http://nogood.io or @higoodie.com http://higoodie.com. Additionally, we do utilize our ATS- Ashby- to help us schedule initial screening calls. Job seeking is hard- we’re sorry that scammers have added this element to your search for something new. Stay vigilant out there!

source_jobs.title: Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT GOODIE AI

Goodie helps leading brands win AI search. As billions of people use ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and other AI systems to discover products and make buying decisions, brands need a way to understand and influence how they’re represented.

Goodie gives teams a full AI control plane: real-time visibility into how AI models speak about their brand and products, how competitors show up, and an optimization engine to improve visibility and performance. This category didn’t exist two years ago - we were early, and we’re defining it.

We’re backed by strong investors, trusted by category-leading customers, and scaling fast. We’re hiring curious, ambitious builders to help shape the future of AI search.

 

What we are looking for:

As a Product Manager for the Goodie AI, you will drive development and launch of AI products focused on marketing use cases. You will work closely with our Engineering and Design teams to solve some of the most interesting problems in the world of marketing and build scalable, industry-leading observability platform.


What you'll do:

 - Lead and drive the product development lifecycle from ideation to launch, ensuring alignment with product vision, customer needs. .

 - Manage project timelines, resources, and deliverables to ensure velocity in deployment and successful on-time product launches.

 - Utilize product analytics tools to gather insights, measure product performance, and inform data-driven decisions.

 - Define and prioritize product features, creating clear roadmaps and communicating them effectively to stakeholders.

 - Drive the development of marketing collateral, including landing pages, guides, and presentations, to effectively communicate product value.

 - Work closely with sales and marketing teams to support go-to-market strategies and product positioning.

 - Continuously assess market trends and customer feedback to refine and improve products.

 - Ensure that all products meet high standards of quality, usability, and performance.

 - Foster a culture of continuous learning and improvement within the AI Lab.

What you have:

 - 4+ years of experience in product management, preferably with B2B SaaS products focused on marketing use cases and persona.

 - Strong knowledge and passion for AI, with experience in Generative AI product development being a plus.

 - A degree in Product Management, Computer Science, Data Analytics, Marketing, or a related field is a plus.

 - Experience working with consumer to mid-market B2B SaaS products.

 - Proficiency in product analytics tools like Mixpanel, Amplitude or Aha!

 - A proven track record of coordinating between design and engineering teams to achieve sprint goals on time.

 - Excellent project management skills and the ability to manage multiple priorities effectively.

 - Strong communication skills with the ability to convey product value through landing pages, guides, and presentations.

 - An analytical mindset with the ability to drive product decisions based on data and users feedback.

 - A collaborative approach, working seamlessly with cross-functional teams to deliver results.




 




BEWARE OF FRAUD! Please be aware of potentially fraudulent job postings or suspicious activity by persons that are posing as Goodie team members, recruiters, and HR employees. Our team will contact you regarding job opportunities from email addresses ending in @nogood.io http://nogood.io or @higoodie.com http://higoodie.com. Additionally, we do utilize our ATS- Ashby- to help us schedule initial screening calls. Job seeking is hard- we’re sorry that scammers have added this element to your search for something new. Stay vigilant out there!

source_jobs.title: Data Scientist
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT GOODIE AI:



Goodie helps leading brands win AI search. As billions of people use ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and other AI systems to discover products and make buying decisions, brands need a way to understand and influence how they’re represented.

Goodie gives teams a full AI control plane: real-time visibility into how AI models speak about their brand and products, how competitors show up, and an optimization engine to improve visibility and performance. This category didn’t exist two years ago - we were early, and we’re defining it.

We’re backed by strong investors, trusted by category-leading customers, and scaling fast. We’re hiring curious, ambitious builders to help shape the future of AI search.





What we are looking for:

Goodie AI is searching for a talented and ambitious Data Scientist to join our growing team! Goodie helps brands win visibility and revenue across AI search, LLMs, and agentic commerce. You will be the point person turning messy multi-model signals into measurement, forecasts, and optimizations that our product can act on. If you enjoy building models that ship and change customer behavior, you will like this seat.





What you’ll do:

 - Work with large datasets. Own efficient querying, cleaning, labeling, and taxonomy alignment for brands, SKUs, and categories.

 - Design sampling and classification strategies that turn noisy LLM outputs and crawler logs into reliable brand and product insights.

 - Use LLMs and NLP to extract structure from unstructured text at scale. Topics include query fan-out, sentiment, citation extraction, and entity linking for brands, products, and creators.

 - Define product-grade metrics. Create durable definitions for visibility score, answer coverage, product presence, and agentic checkout readiness.

 - Build and run experimentation frameworks. A/B tests, holdouts, counterfactuals, and uplift modeling to quantify impact on citations, share of voice, and conversions.

 - Develop and refine predictive models that analyze and forecast AI search behavior across models and surfaces.

 - Translate complex findings into clear decisions. Partner with the founding team to inform roadmap, pricing, and customer playbooks.

 - Create evaluation harnesses. Establish automatic evals and human-in-the-loop labeling for model quality, bias, and drift across LLM providers.

 - Detect anomalies. Build monitors for crawler behavior, rankings, and feed health to catch regressions before customers do.





What you have:

 - 3 to 7 years in applied analytics or data science within tech, marketing, or ads. Startup or high-growth experience preferred.

 - Strong Python and SQL. Comfortable in notebooks and in code reviews.

 - Skilled with sampling and inference. Stratified sampling, bootstrapping, extrapolation, reweighting, and variance estimation.

 - Solid ML toolkit. Time series, classification, regression, weak supervision, and methods to estimate event frequency from partial observations.

 - Practical LLM knowledge. Strengths in prompt design, structured extraction, embeddings, and an understanding of model limits and failure modes.

 - Curious and current on multi-modal and LLM research. You enjoy reading papers and pressure testing ideas in real data.

 - Builder mindset in a fast team. You value clarity, speed, and ownership.



Bonus/Nice to have:

 - Experience with large-scale information extraction or search quality

 - Background in causal inference, MMM, or attribution models

 - Hands-on work with product feeds and retail catalogs

 - Contributions to open source or published work we can read

 - Deployed side projects we can click through



Our data and modeling canvas:

 - Problems: AI search measurement, AEO scoring, agentic commerce readiness, product catalog and feed integrity, ranking and citation shifts, attribution for AI traffic

 - Signals: LLM responses, crawler and agent logs, SERP and AI answer snapshots, product feeds, marketplace metadata, G

source_jobs.title: Director of Sales
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT GOODIE AI:



Goodie helps leading brands win AI search. As billions of people use ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and other AI systems to discover products and make buying decisions, brands need a way to understand and influence how they’re represented.

Goodie gives teams a full AI control plane: real-time visibility into how AI models speak about their brand and products, how competitors show up, and an optimization engine to improve visibility and performance. This category didn’t exist two years ago – we were early, and we’re defining it.

We’re backed by strong investors, trusted by category-leading customers, and scaling fast. We’re hiring curious, ambitious builders to help shape the future of AI search.

 

What we're looking for:

This is not a role where you execute someone else's strategy. It's the role where you buld the strategy, write the playbook, carry the number, and grown the team.

A player-coch by instinct, you want to close deals yourself and coach others to do the same. You don't wait for the process to be handed to you, you build it from what's wrong in the field and refine it unitl it scales. Seeing around corner is second nature: Identifying the path forward without being told, and holding yourself to a higher standard than anyone else would.

Reporting directly to the CEO, you'll carry your own quota and manage a small but hungry team working a mix of inbound and outbound. The opportunity: define the sales function at one of the most important AI infrastructure companies being built right now.

 

What you'll do:

Own Revenue

 - Carry a personal sales quota and close enterprise and mid-market deals with brand, marketing, and digital teams at some of the worlds largest companies.

 - Run full-cycle sales: discovery, demos, business cases, negotiation, and contracting on your own book of business.

 - own inbound conversion and build on Goodies outbound motion, targeting CMOs, VP's of Marketing, VPs of SEO and digital marketing leaders.

Build and Coach the Team

 - Set performance expectations, coach pipeline execution and hold reps to consistent standards.

 - Define the ideal AE hiring profile and build the onboarding program that will scale beyond your first hires.

Define the Sales Playbook

 - Refine Goodie's sales playbook: ICP definition, buyer personas, discovery frameworks, competitive handling, and deal strategy.

 - Develop ROI narratives and business case frameworks that translate Goodie's platform into quantifiable outcomes for enterprise marketing teams.

 - Identify whats's working in the market and turn it into repeatable process before scaling.

Drive GRM Strategy

 - Own the revenue strategy with full accountability for direction. This role is for someone who generates strategy, not someone who waits for it.

 - Partner directly with the CEO and the rest of the leadership team on GTM alignment, campaign feedback, and pipeline planning.

 - Feel product, marketing, and leadership with intelligence from the field: Objections, competitor signals, unmet buyer needs, and category narratives.
   
    

What you have:

 - 5+ years of enterprise of mid-market B2B SaaS sales, with a consistent track record of hitting or exceeding quota.

 - Direct experience in a player-coach or sales management capacity.

 - Startup instincts: you've operated in an environment without a fully built playbook and you've built one rather than waiting for it.

 - Proven ability to manage both inbound pipeline and build outbound motions, ideally at the same company.

 - Executive presence and communication skills: you can run a credible discovery call with a VP, build census with multiple stakeholders, and close with a C-suite decision maker.

 - Hands-on fluency with modern sales tools (HubSpot, Outreach, Apollo, Clay, or equivalents).
   
    

Bonus/Nice-to-haves

 - Background in martech, SEO platforms, digital marketing technology, or AI-native SaaS products.

 - Experience at a company transitioning fro

EEO & Compensation Transparency:

Goodie AI is committed to pay transparency and equity among all employees and provides employees an environment where pay transparency and dialogue on compensation are allowed. Goodie AI complies with federal, state, and local laws on compensation, pay transparency, and pay equity. We take factors including geographic location, education, training, skillset, market rates, certifications, and more into consideration when constructing pay ranges for new and existing roles within our organization. The compensation range for this position is $130,000-$160,000.

At Go

Benefits & Perks Of Becoming a Goodie:

 - Earn More, Together: Base Pay + Profit Sharing & Commissions Opportunities

 - Health First: Premium Medical, Dental & Vision Coverage

 - Flex Work Environment: Hybrid at HQ and Remote Globally

 - Set Up Shop: Home Office Stipend

 - Recharge Anytime: Unlimited PTO Plan

 - Family First: Paid Parental Leave Plan

 - Secure Your Future: 401(k) Plan with Employer Matching

 - Level Up: Mentorship & Career Growth Support

 - Always Be Learning: Access to Top-tier Resources & Industry Experts

 - Work Hard, Play Harder: Quarterly Team Trips (Onsite and Offsite)

 - Mind & Body Wellness: Gym, Wellness, and Access to Mental Health Plans

 - Fuel Your Day: Free Lunch, Snacks, Cold Brew, & Happy Hours

 - Grow With Us: Endless Opportunities to Lead & Succeed

 - Keep on Shining: Ongoing Employee Dev

notes: Early-stage AI search company with strong investor backing, defining a new category.
